linting.notes: No linter configuration found. No .golangci.yml, .flake8, pylintrc, or other linter configs present.

testing.run_command: cd superset && container-structure-test test -i quay.io/opendatahub/superset:1.5.2-ubi -c test-config.yaml
setup_required: Build the superset image first: cd superset && podman build -t quay.io/opendatahub/superset:1.5.2-ubi .
testing.notes: No unit tests found. No *_test.go files for Go code, no Python test files. Only one container structure test for the superset image that validates package installation, file existence, and metadata.

ci.notes: No CI/CD system configured. No .github/workflows, no Tekton, no Jenkins, no other CI system found.

build.install_command: No dependency install needed - Go modules vendored, container builds self-contained
build.build_command: For Go components: go build ./... (or use Makefiles for container builds)
build.notes: Repository contains multiple independent container images. configmap-puller: make build (uses Makefile), leader-election: build via Dockerfile, superset: make build (uses Makefile). Go dependencies are vendored in configmap-puller.

conventions.import_style: Go: standard library imports, then third-party, then k8s.io imports. Python: standard imports.
conventions.notes: No established testing conventions since no tests exist. Go code uses standard Kubernetes client-go patterns. Two Go components are independent tools, not libraries.

setup_commands: # No system dependencies needed - Go toolchain includes everything
container_recipe.notes: Go build validated successfully. Both configmap-puller and leader-election compile without errors. No linters or unit tests to run.

results.notes: Go 1.15 build succeeded. All k8s.io dependencies compiled correctly.
Go 1.14 build succeeded. Dependencies downloaded from network since not vendored.

validation.summary: Go builds OK (configmap-puller and leader-election). No linters configured. No unit tests present. Container structure test not validated (requires image build + special tool).

gaps: No unit tests - no *_test.go files for Go code, no Python tests
No linter configuration - no golangci-lint, no Python linters
No CI/CD workflows - no automated testing or validation
Container structure test for superset requires manual image build and external tool
leader-election uses deprecated ioutil package (Go 1.16+ deprecation)
Mixed Go versions (1.14 and 1.15) across components
